title: salix × hagensis
intro: Salix × hagensis, also known as the Hagens willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The bark and leaves of Salix × hagensis can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, salves, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
